The ashes of the Moksaka tree should be boiled in water and
mixed with the ashes of reeds. The rock, being heated (as explained
in the previous verse), should be sprinkled seven times successively
with the decoction. Then it will break.
[The reading we have is faff" which is wrong. It should be
Hence I have taken the liberty of correcting it. The mistake
must have been committed by the scribe, the tree is otherwise
known as according to Utpala, but the says ;
